invite.title: Invite to {name}
invite.linkSubtitle: Anyone with this link can join the board.
invite.shareText: Join my board on World Cup Pick'em: {name}
invite.alreadyPlaying: {name} & {count, plural, one {# other} other {# others}} already playing
invite.beFirst: Be the first to invite your friends

inviteLanding.players: {count, plural, one {# player is already competing in this board} other {# players are already competing in this board}}
inviteLanding.invalidDescription: This invite link is invalid or has expired. Ask for a fresh one.

empty.title: You're not on any board yet
empty.description: Start your own board for friends, or join one with a code.

create.title: Create board
create.description: Boards are private. Share the join code to invite friends.
create.name: Name

join.title: Join with code
join.description: Paste the 8-character code your friend shared with you.

manage.title: Manage {name}
manage.forbidden: You no longer have permission to manage this board

general.name: Board name
general.joinCodeSubtitle: Share this code so others can join.
general.regenerateWarning: Generating a new code invalidates the previous one — the old code stops working.

delete.description: Deleting the board removes all its members, competitions, and results. This can't be undone.

members.promoteSubtitle: Let them manage members and competitions

removeConfirm.title: Remove {name}?
removeConfirm.description: They'll lose access to this board's competitions. They can rejoin with the code.

members.transferSubtitle: Hand over the board — you'll stay as admin

transferConfirm.title: Transfer ownership to {name}?
transferConfirm.description: Type {username} below to confirm. You'll become an admin afterwards.

leave.title: Leave board
leave.description: You won't see this board's competitions anymore. You can rejoin with the code.
